B

Base class for Rest applications that clarifies the Jersey API.

J

JerseyJettyPlugin - Class in com.telenav.kivakit.web.jersey
BaseServletJettyPlugin plugin that can be added to JettyServer to serve REST resources from the ResourceConfig application passed to the constructor.
JerseyJettyPlugin(ResourceConfig) - Constructor for class com.telenav.kivakit.web.jersey.JerseyJettyPlugin
 
JerseyJsonSerializer<T> - Class in com.telenav.kivakit.web.jersey
Performs serialization compatible with the Jersey REST API via *javax.ws.rs* interfaces.
JerseyJsonSerializer(GsonObjectSerializer) - Constructor for class com.telenav.kivakit.web.jersey.JerseyJsonSerializer
